series.curator_notes: Main film trilogy Hörspiele based on the DreamWorks films, plus the 'Homecoming' special. Spin-off series (Die Reiter von Berk, Die Wächter von Berk, Auf zu neuen Ufern, Die jungen Drachenretter, Die 9 Welten) are curated under separate artist entries. Episode numbers assigned by film chronology: 1=first film (2025 version), 2=second film, 3=third film, 4=special.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.

verification.concerns: The series lacks episodes 5+, but given the official Spotify releases only cover films 1-3 and one special ("Die guten alten Zeiten"), this appears complete for what exists on this platform. The curation is sound – included albums match the films correctly (1, 2, 3, and the special), and the 2010 duplicate was correctly excluded as it is superseded by the 2025 re-release which has more parts (26 vs 20 tracks).
